title: Secondary school performance data in England: 2024 to 2025
body: "The Compare school and college performance in England service now includes secondary school performance data for 2024 to 2025.  This shows:   attainment results for pupils at the end of key stage 4 the progress made by pupils between the end of primary school and the end of secondary school  "

taxons.title: School performance tables and Ofsted reports
